What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive real estate solutions tailored to buyers, sellers, and investors across the NCR region.

Residential Properties

Flats, builder floors, and independent houses in Alpha-1, Alpha-2, Beta, Gamma, and across Greater Noida sectors.

Commercial Spaces

Offices, retail shops, showrooms, and commercial plots in Alpha Commercial Belt, Knowledge Park, and business hubs.

Residential Plots

Approved plots along Yamuna Expressway, Jewar, and Greater Noida authority sectors — ready for construction.

Property Consultation

Expert advice on property valuation, legal documentation, home loans, and investment planning for best returns.

Farm Houses

Premium farm house plots and developed farm houses in the green belt around Greater Noida and Bulandshahr region.

Home Loan Assistance

Tie-ups with leading banks and HFCs for quick, hassle-free home loan processing and documentation support.

Why Vihan Property

Built on Trust & Expertise

We have been serving homebuyers and investors in Greater Noida for over a decade with transparent dealings and personalized service.

01

Legal Verified Properties

Every listing is checked for clear titles, RERA registration, and authority approvals before we recommend it.

02

Local Market Expertise

Deep knowledge of Alpha Belt, Yamuna Expressway corridor, Knowledge Park, and all key sectors of Greater Noida.

03

End-to-End Support

From property search to registration, loan assistance, and post-possession support — we handle everything.

04

No Hidden Charges

Complete transparency in pricing, brokerage, and documentation fees. What you see is what you pay.

Legal Compliance

All Plots Approved by Authorised Bodies

Every residential, commercial, and industrial plot we deal in is fully approved and regulated by the official development authorities governing Greater Noida and the Yamuna Expressway Corridor — ensuring complete legal compliance and peace of mind.

Active Approval

Greater Noida Authority

Greater Noida Industrial Development Authority (GNIDA)

Residential plots across Alpha, Beta, Gamma, Delta, Eta, Zeta, Omicron, Mu, Xu, Sigma, Swarnagri, and other GNIDA-governed sectors.

Active Approval

YEIDA

Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority

Governing body for all plots along the Yamuna Expressway Corridor — Sector 18, 20, 22D, 25 (7% Kisan Quota) — including Jewar Airport zone.

Active Approval

UPSIDA

Uttar Pradesh State Industrial Development Authority

All industrial plots in Greater Noida are developed and approved under UPSIDA's industrial development framework — fully compliant and investment-ready.

Approved Development Plans

Master Plans

Official master plans governing land use and development across Greater Noida and the Yamuna Expressway corridor — giving you complete clarity on zoning, sectors, and future infrastructure.

Meet the Director

Guided by Experience

With over a decade of deep-rooted presence in the Greater Noida real estate market, Pankaj Kumar has helped hundreds of families and investors find the right property at the right price.

His personal involvement in every transaction ensures clients receive honest advice, backed by genuine market intelligence — not just sales talk.

Personalised, one-on-one client meetings
In-depth knowledge of Greater Noida sectors
Strong builder & authority relationships
Post-purchase support & documentation help
Trusted by 500+ families across NCR
